user_system_path: Issue #364 IN PROGRESS — fixing workday-presence-trigger-runner so it actually fires in production (CRON_SECRET was never provisioned to GitHub Actions).
allowed_files_raw: the trigger-runner workflow + its new direct-call script, plus control-plane files
forbidden_files_raw: dashboard UI, components — this is a backend cron-plumbing fix only
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run lint && npx vitest run lib/workday-presence
required_browser_proof: not applicable — backend-only fix, no UI surface
acceptance_condition: PR merged; next scheduled GitHub Actions run for workday-presence-trigger-runner.yml completes without the silent-401 failure mode (clean quiet/dedup_suppressed/intervention outcome in the run log).
stop_condition: Stop after the PR is merged and one live scheduled run is confirmed to execute the trigger-runner logic (not necessarily an intervention — quiet is a valid healthy outcome).
anti_regression_checks: lint passes on the new script
next_command: Open PR for issue #364, then merge once gate:continuity is green.
